name: Malaysian Ringgit
description: The Malaysian Ringgit means 'jagged' in Malay, referring to the jagged edges of Spanish silver dollars that once circulated in the region.
historicalNotes: The ringgit replaced the Malaya and British Borneo dollar in 1967. During the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis, Malaysia controversially pegged the ringgit to the US dollar and imposed capital controls.
